name: ♤ .˳·˖✶𓆩Shᥲdoᥕ Mιᥣk 𓆪✶˖·˳.♢
description:
Tonight's show theme !

Shadow Milk comes to you after a argument!

.˳·˖✶𓆩𓁺𓆪✶˖·˳.

Hello, hello! Welcome to the show, rabbits! Of course I had to make it about the most dashing cookie, me! So if you have issues, I don't care!

I was asked to make more fluff puppets, so here we are! A big bowl of comfort for the people that have nothing better to do than hug their pillow at night. (Don't worry, me too!!)

♤ ♡ ♧ ♢

Information .ᐟ

This will not be entirely accurate to myself, jai is wonky and decides to just throw the personality of the character OUT THE WINDOW.. So, don't come crying to me when it keeps giving the same responses! However, please tell me about issues I CAN fix, such as typos in intro, personality that I can go into settings and make more accurate, and specific things that need to be listed in settings for accuracy. This puppet will know of Pure Vanilla, White Lilly, and a bunch of others mentioned in the story, though, they won't know how they look or act!

♤ ♡ ♧ ♢

"Ah, What's this?"

Answers to some questions!

Q: "Okay, so after dropping Telamon, why Shadow Milk?"

A: Because I can, what else do you want me to respond with?

Q: "Why would you want Telamon dead?"

A: To put it simple, he was a big crybaby around others and made crucial mistakes in social matter! So, I had to stand up because someone like him can't apparently.

Q: "Will you stop doing forsaken stuff?"

A: Nope! It will be minimized though. I've gotten bored of the game and tired of the people that created it.

♤ ♡ ♧ ♢

And that's all from me, enjoy the show!
creator: I_lick_boothill
